_comment: Template for report-data.json. Copy to data/report-data.json (gitignored) and replace placeholders with values from data/metrics.json + your org's real wage table.

trend._comment: Run cicd-impact/scripts/01-fetch-actions-data.sh with --window 90/30/14/7 four times, or extract from data/metrics.json. n_all = total successful runs in window; mean_all = mean wall-clock min across all events; n_pr / mean_pr = same restricted to PR-event runs (the 'developer felt' number).

inputs_seed._comment: Initial values for the Inputs sheet. Wage values are the only ones an executive must define; the rest are measured.

active_devs_options._comment: Three measurements for D — the active-developer count. Pick which one matches the audience.

core.label: CORE TEAM
core.rule: developers with >5 commits in the last 90 days

recommended.label: RECOMMENDED
recommended.rule: distinct authors with at least one commit in the last 90 days

upper.label: UPPER BOUND
upper.rule: distinct GitHub actors who triggered any CI run (includes one-off PR pushers, rerun-clickers, bot automation)
